# Support

Digital Sports CRM is provided as open-source software for self-hosting and adaptation.

There is no guaranteed support, hosting, maintenance, uptime, response time, roadmap commitment, or service-level agreement.

For help:

- Use public issues or discussions for reproducible bugs and general questions.
- Provide clear reproduction steps and environment details.
- Do not share secrets, private URLs, production data, personal data, invoices, uploaded documents, or private branding.

Commercial support, managed hosting, custom development, and private maintenance arrangements are outside the scope of this repository unless separately agreed in writing.
